title: calystegia fulcrata
intro: Calystegia fulcrata, also known as the Beach Morning Glory, is a flowering vine native to the coastal regions of Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help with respiratory issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Calystegia fulcrata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
